title: International Business University - Canada.ca
content:
## International Business University
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Honours Bachelor of Commerce in International Management and Technology
- Honours Bachelor of Commerce in Business Management
- Honours Bachelor of Commerce in Digital Sales and Marketing Management
- Master of Business Administration in Technology, Innovation and Entrepreneurship (TIE)
- Master of Business Administration in Global Business Management (GBM)
- Master of Business Administration in Financial and Management Analytics (FMA)
- Master of Business Administration in Information Systems Management (ISM)
- Master of Business Administration in General Stream (GS)
- Master of Business Administration - Healthcare Management
- Master of Business Administration - Digital Health and Data Analytics
